School.Name: Sri Venkateswara Convent
School.Tagline: Digital school operations for parents, students, teachers, and administrators.
School.Location: Bayyavaram, Krosur Mandal, Palnadu District, Andhra Pradesh, India
School.AdmissionsHeadline: Ready to join the 2026-2027 academic year?

Notices.Title: Unit Test Timetable Published
Notices.Summary: Students can review the timetable and subject-wise portions in the academics section.

Notices.Title: Parent Teacher Meeting
Notices.Summary: Class teachers will be available between 9:30 AM and 1:00 PM.

Notices.Title: Monsoon Transport Advisory
Notices.Summary: Buses may run 10 minutes early during heavy rain. Track route status before pickup.

AcademicEvents.Title: Foundational Literacy Review
AcademicEvents.Description: Assessment for primary classes with teacher feedback.

AcademicEvents.Title: Sports Selection Trials
AcademicEvents.Description: Kho-kho, kabaddi, cricket, and athletics selection.

QuickActions.Title: Student Login
QuickActions.Description: Academic dashboard for timetable, curriculum, lessons, assignments, fees, and notices.

QuickActions.Title: Teacher Login
QuickActions.Description: Teacher workspace for student records, academics, attendance, communication, and admin tasks.

QuickActions.Title: Admissions
QuickActions.Description: Admission enquiries, document collection, and fee confirmation.

QuickActions.Title: Notices
QuickActions.Description: Latest circulars, events, and school-wide announcements.

StudentModules.Title: Timetable
StudentModules.Description: Daily and weekly class schedule with subject, teacher, room, and period timings.

StudentModules.Title: Curriculum
StudentModules.Description: Class-wise syllabus, lesson plan, subjects, learning outcomes, and academic calendar.

StudentModules.Title: Study Content
StudentModules.Description: Digital academic content for students, including notes, worksheets, assignments, and reference material.

StudentModules.Title: Attendance and Progress
StudentModules.Description: Attendance percentage, performance summaries, teacher remarks, and parent-visible progress updates.

StudentModules.Title: School Details
StudentModules.Description: Student profile, fee status, notices, transport details, and contact information.

TeacherModules.Title: Student Academic View
TeacherModules.Description: Everything available to students, including timetable, curriculum, content, assignments, and progress.

TeacherModules.Title: Attendance Management
TeacherModules.Description: Mark daily attendance, update late entries, approve corrections, and notify parents.

TeacherModules.Title: Academic Content Admin
TeacherModules.Description: Create and maintain lesson plans, curriculum units, study material, homework, and exam schedules.

TeacherModules.Title: Student Records
TeacherModules.Description: Maintain profiles, guardian contacts, health notes, fee status visibility, and progress records.

TeacherModules.Title: School Management
TeacherModules.Description: Operational tasks for notices, circulars, events, transport coordination, staff communication, and maintenance requests.

TeacherModules.Title: Administration Reports
TeacherModules.Description: Class summaries, attendance trends, academic progress, fee follow-up lists, and management dashboards.

AboutUs.Title: About Sri Venkateswara Convent
AboutUs.Summary: Sri Venkateswara Convent is a modern school platform for academics, communication, and administration with a reusable structure that can be adapted to another school by replacing configuration values.
Highlights: Student and teacher portals on web and mobile
Reusable configuration for school identity and content
Principles: Keep learning content clear and accessible
Support teachers with practical management tools
Keep families informed with notices and progress updates
